responsibilities: Architect end-to-end technical solutions for complex, multi-team systems that scale to millions of concurrent users
Define long-term technical strategy and roadmaps in partnership with engineering directors and product leadership
Lead design reviews and establish architectural standards across multiple engineering teams and codebases
Mentor senior and staff engineers on system design, debugging strategies, and engineering best practices
Identify and resolve critical performance bottlenecks in distributed systems handling petabyte-scale data
Drive cross-team technical initiatives such as platform migrations, service decomposition, and infrastructure modernization
Evaluate build-versus-buy decisions for core platform components and present recommendations to leadership
Author and socialize technical RFCs and design documents that align engineering teams on architectural direction
Champion engineering excellence by improving CI/CD pipelines, testing standards, and observability practices
Act as a technical escalation point for production incidents impacting business-critical systems
